positive: A vibrant, stylized geometric depiction of a soaring albatross taking flight. The albatross is rendered with stark, powerful black silhouette against a gradient background of deep indigo and ethereal cyan. The wings are dramatically arcing, forming strong, repeating, mandala-like patterns that fill the central space. Abstract geometric wave patterns surround the bird, suggesting motion and wind currents. The overall composition is highly balanced and symmetrical, suitable for screen printing. Pop art style mixed with linocut aesthetics. Clean lines, high contrast, maximalist yet cohesive design. Flat vector illustration, graphic novel style, centered composition, perfect for textile printing, rule of thirds adherence.
negative: blurry, low detail, gradient noise, watermarks, text, signature, logo, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealism, messy, messy composition, poor contrast
